title: Spike: large PDF upload strategy (chunking, resume, integrity)
description:
## GH: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/111

Design upload strategy: chunked upload, resume on failure, SHA-256 integrity, idempotent dedup. Evaluate tus.io/Uppy for client-side. Server-side page splitting for parallel OCR.

**Depends on:** RAM/streaming spike (#114 outcome informs chunking strategy).
**Deliverable:** Upload architecture design + client/server contract.
